display_text: Black King Bar, Cost: 4050: Grants spell immunity, blocking most enemy spells, disables, and dealing magic damage for a limited duration. Also provides 60% magic resistance and immunity to pure and reflected damage. This is a core defensive commitment for carries and initiators to operate safely in fights. Stats: CD: 95s, Mana: 50, Duration: 9/8/7/6s, Magic Resist: 60%.

display_text: Black King Bar, Cost: 4050: Provides a significant boost to raw survivability with +10 Strength and +24 damage. The damage makes it a viable offensive-defensive purchase for right-clicking cores. Stats: +10 Strength, +24 Damage.

display_text: Black King Bar, Cost: 4050: The quintessential defensive teamfight item, allowing a hero to ignore enemy control and magic burst, enabling them to deal damage or cast spells unimpeded. Its duration is a key resource to manage in engagements. A core pick-up on heroes vulnerable to being kited or disabled.

display_text: Black King Bar, Cost: 4050: Situational counter against heavy magic damage and disables. Essential when facing lineups with multiple stuns, silences, slows, or high magic burst. Use the immunity duration strategically to counter key enemy ultimates and spells. Stats: CD: 95s.

display_text: Black King Bar, Cost: 4050: Core synergy for right-clicking carries and melee initiators who need to get close and deal damage without being locked down. Often built after core damage or farming items to transition into mid-game team fights. The timing of purchase is critical for maintaining map pressure.
